{{Quote|City was being lived in by my own people! Yes! Was great majesty, and wonderful comfort. But then, one day city die! Bombs fall from ships flown by people called 'Empire', yes? No reason then – no reason now. But bombs turn city to ruins, and turn my people to homeless nomads.|[[G'hinji Dros]]|<ref name="SW62" />}}
'''Shalyvane''' was a planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] and the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Em'liy/Legends|Em'liy]].

==History==
{{Quote|Vader project required total razing of city of Chinshassa on planet Shalyvane to establish a credible background for subject.|Imperial data recording about [[Lumiya|Shira Brie]]|<ref name="SW62" />}}
During the [[Galactic War]], a rare lunar [[Eclipse/Legends|eclipse]] was prophesised to reveal the location where the [[Em'liy/Legends|Em'liy]] [[Deity/Legends|god]] [[Kavaan]] was believed to have left his mark on Shalyvane.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Archaeology|Provider of the Sun}}</ref>

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="Gamer" /> during [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Shalyvane was violently [[Cleansing of Shalyvane|attacked]] by the Galactic Empire, which drove the native Em'liy out of their capital, [[Chinshassa]], turning the population as nomads.<ref name="SW62" /><ref name="Gamer" /> The attack was in fact intended to support Imperial agent [[Lumiya|Shira Brie's]] backstory when she infiltrated the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="SW63">[[Star Wars (1977) 63|''Star Wars'' (1977) 63]]</ref><ref name="Gamer" /> Shira Brie claimed she was a native of Shalyvane, and that its [[Human/Legends|Human]] population had been wiped out by the "barbarian" Em'liy and their Imperial allies.<ref name="SW60" />

Shira Brie, along with fellow pilots [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Hanc Thorben]] and [[Wald (pilot)|Wald]] once visited Chinshassa after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] as a pretended pilgrimage but they were [[Skirmish at Chinshassa|attacked]] by a large group of Em'liy warriors and forced to escape the planet.<ref name="SW60" /> After the [[Battle of the secret armada]] and the presumed death of Shira Brie, Luke Skywalker returned to Shalyvane. The Em'liy told him the truth of their history and Luke found a [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] message left in Chinshassa by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], which revealed Shira as the double-agent she was.<ref name="SW62" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], an Em'liy representative attended at the [[First Conference of Free Peoples]], which led to the [[Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets]].<ref name="SW90">[[Star Wars (1977) 90|''Star Wars'' (1977) 90]]</ref>
